inputs.name: projectPath
inputs.description: Absolute path to the selected output CodeRef vault root.

inputs.name: repositoryPath
inputs.description: Resolved repository identity hint for the selected target.

inputs.name: vaultId
inputs.description: Resolved output vault id alias kept for compatibility.

inputs.name: vaultName
inputs.description: Resolved output vault name alias kept for compatibility.

inputs.name: vaultType
inputs.description: Resolved output vault type alias kept for compatibility.

inputs.name: researchDirection
inputs.description: Structured investigation direction entered by the user.

inputs.name: repositoryUrls
inputs.description: Optional ordered Git repository URLs that should be cloned or updated under repos/.

inputs.name: referenceVaults
inputs.description: Optional read-only reference vault summaries resolved from the preset selection.

inputs.name: targetProjects
inputs.description: Optional normalized project references with read or write access semantics.

inputs.name: reposDirectory
inputs.description: Absolute path to the selected output vault repos/ workspace.

inputs.name: docsDirectory
inputs.description: Absolute path to the selected output vault docs/ area.
